query: (SELECT 'Gisele' as paciente, id, tipoUltrassom, JSON_KEYS(dados) as campos, dados FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = (SELECT id FROM gestantes WHERE LOWER(nome) LIKE '%gisele%batista%' LIMIT 1) AND tipoUltrassom = 'ultrassom_seguimento' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1)
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute (SELECT 'Gisele' as paciente, id, tipoUltrassom, JSON_KEYS(dados) as campos, dados FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = (SELECT id FROM gestantes WHERE LOWER(nome) LIKE '%gisele%batista%' LIMIT 1) AND tipoUltrassom = 'ultrassom_seguimento' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1)
